title: How Much Does the CCA Exam Cost?
description: Anthropic's CCA Foundations exam is free for the first 5,000 partner-company employees during early access; the reported standard fee elsewhere is $99 USD.
h1: How Much Does the Claude Certified Architect (CCA) Exam Cost?

faq.q: How much does the Claude Certified Architect exam cost?
faq.a: Anthropic's CCA Foundations exam is currently free for the first 5,000 employees at partner companies as part of an early-access program. Outside of that program, the reported general registration fee is $99 USD, paid directly to Anthropic when you schedule your exam. Confirm current pricing and eligibility on Anthropic's official registration portal before booking.

body:
As of this writing, Anthropic's CCA Foundations exam is free for the first 5,000 employees at partner companies through an early-access program; for everyone else, the registration fee is reported at $99 USD, paid directly to Anthropic when you schedule your session through their registration portal.

Those two figures come from different parts of Anthropic's own materials, and it's worth being upfront that we can't fully reconcile them from outside: the free early-access tier is described as being for employees of Anthropic partner companies specifically, while the $99 figure appears as a general registration fee. We genuinely don't know, from public information, exactly where the line falls between the two, or how long the early-access pricing will last. Treat both numbers as a starting point, not a guarantee — visit Anthropic's official registration page to confirm your eligibility and the current price before you commit to a date.

Either way, $99 (or simply your time, if you're inside the free-access window) is real cost riding on a single attempt, and a mandatory waiting period applies if you need to retake the exam. Before you book, it's worth getting an honest read on where you stand: our free 10-question diagnostic scores you across all five domains against the 720/1,000 passing standard in about five minutes, so you can decide whether to schedule now or spend a few more weeks with our free practice questions first.

This is an independent exam-prep resource and is not affiliated with Anthropic. The pricing and access details above are drawn from publicly available information and may not reflect the latest terms — please verify directly with Anthropic before relying on them.
